tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Gavin Degraw
Song: I Don't Want To Be

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I don't need to be anything other[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Than a prison guard's son[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I don't need to be anything other[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Than a specialist's son[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I don't have to be anything other[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Than the birth of two souls in one[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Part of where I'm going, is knowing where I'm coming from[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
  I don't want to be anything other than what I've been trying to be lately[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
All I have to do is think of me and I have peace of mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
  I'm tired of looking round rooms wondering what I gotta do[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Or who I'm supposed to be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]
I don't want to be anything other than me[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I'm surrounded by liars everywhere I turn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I'm surrounded by imposters everywhere I turn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I'm surrounded by identity crisis everywhere I turn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Am I the only one who noticed?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I can't be the only one who's learned[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
  I don't want to be anything other than what I've been trying to be lately[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
All I have to do is think of me and I have peace of mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
  I'm tired of looking round rooms wondering what I gotta do[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Or who I'm supposed to be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]
I don't want to be anything other than me[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                        [ch]Em7[/ch]
Can I have everyone's attention please[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]
See, not like this and that[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
You're gonna have to leave[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
I came from the mountain, the crust of creation[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]C[/ch]
My whole situation made from clay, dust, stone[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
And now I'm telling everybody[/tab]

[Chorus] (to end)
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
  I don't want to be anything other than what I've been trying to be lately[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
All I have to do is think of me and I have peace of mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
  I'm tired of looking round rooms wondering what I gotta do[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
Or who I'm supposed to be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]
I don't want to be anything other than me[/tab]
